module.name: common
module.purpose: Shared interfaces used across the second-generation source tree, including typed TOML configuration with fallible runtime loading, folder-based serializable chat user message envelopes, shared channel errors, remoc session/task protocol messages, and centralized crate-local external-library namespaces.

childModules.name: channel
childModules.purpose: Shared channel error type and crate-internal remoc SessionEvent protocol used by client and agent endpoints.

childModules.name: config
childModules.purpose: Strongly typed single-entry TOML configuration loader with fallible runtime loading, alias substitution, and credential resolution.

childModules.name: external
childModules.purpose: Crate-local third-party library namespace wrappers used by source modules instead of importing external crates directly.

childModules.name: message
childModules.purpose: Folder-based shared user message trait, user message type enum, serializable user message envelope, and chat message payload type exchanged between client and agent.
